items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 southbound between 1 miles NORTH of Exit 20: COLUMBUS BLVD/WASHINGTON AVE and Exit 20: COLUMBUS BLVD/WASHINGTON AVE. There is a lane restriction.
